overall.description: A first-person perspective driving through a rain-soaked futuristic city street in a cyberpunk setting, passing beneath an elevated transit track with a massive circular megabuilding looming through the fog. The scene features heavy rainfall, neon street lighting, and wet asphalt reflections characteristic of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked urban arterial with elevated transit line

events.description: dark sedan speeds past from right to left across the wet intersection

agents.ego_description: cruising forward along the rain-soaked street toward the illuminated megabuilding complex

notable_agents.action: dark sedan speeding past the camera from right to left through the rain

entered.detail: curved elevated monorail track with support pillars extending into the distance
massive cylindrical stadium-like structure with illuminated windows visible through fog
illuminated advertisement screen glowing on the right side of the street
tall industrial street lights casting yellow-green glow through the rain
yellow and black striped concrete barrier along the road edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-drenched cyberpunk street with a massive circular megabuilding looming through the fog in the distance. An elevated transit track curves overhead on the left while street lamps cast diffuse glows through the heavy downpour. A dark sedan suddenly speeds past from right to left, its tires splashing through the wet asphalt.

events.description: passes directly underneath the elevated transit track, changing overhead spatial geometry

agents.ego_description: continuing forward beneath the transit track, approaching closer to the megabuilding complex

entered.detail: tall smokestack structure visible behind the megabuilding emitting faint smoke

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath the elevated transit track, which shifts from the left side to directly overhead and then to the right as the vehicle progresses. The digital billboard disappears from view while the industrial chimney behind the megabuilding becomes more prominent. The rain continues to fall heavily, creating rippling reflections on the asphalt as the megabuilding grows larger in the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-drenched cyberpunk street that draws closer to a looming circular megabuilding. It begins with the massive structure obscured by fog in the distance, while an elevated transit track curves overhead to the left and a dark sedan suddenly splashes past through the heavy downpour. As the camera advances, the transit track shifts from the left to directly overhead and then to the right, causing the digital billboards to vanish from view. The scene then opens up to reveal a prominent industrial chimney behind the megabuilding, which grows larger and more imposing in the frame. Finally, the perspective pushes deeper into the storm, with the rain creating constant rippling reflections on the wet asphalt.
